summary: Upgraded B05 Action Items block to support structured decomposition at extraction time. Updated canonical_blocks.yaml with new format spec, created Generate_B05_Action_Items.prompt.md with decomposition logic, and enhanced b05_parser.py to handle both legacy and structured formats.
b05_new_format: Structured sections per action item with required fields (title, owner, priority_bucket, first_step, estimated_minutes, domain_name) and optional fields (project_name, milestones). Supports decomposition with 2-minute rule for first steps, priority bucket inference (external/strategic/urgent/normal), domain classification (Careerspan/Zo/Personal/Other), and milestone breakdown for multi-step tasks.
notes_for_orchestrator: Parser includes parse_b05_auto() for format detection - will handle legacy format (checklist) and new structured format. Returns List[Dict] with all decomposition fields. D1.2 (meeting_staging_bridge) should call parse_b05_file() which auto-detects format. The parser also provides get_decomposition_summary() for statistics on parsed items.
